meta.description: DFW homebuilder data for whymovetodallas.com new construction section
data_sources: NewHomeSource public (newhomesource.com) — fallback for builders not on NHS Pro
Google Places API (maps.googleapis.com) — fallback overall rating when NHS unavailable
Builder Websites (scraped via Bright Data web_unlocker1)
suburb-profiles.json (Niche ISD grades for suburb quality scoring)
meta.notes: TrustBuilder scores seeded manually May 2026 from NHS Pro (NTREIS subscription). Alternative reviews (reviews.*) populated by tools/reviews-fetcher.cjs for 13 builders not on NHS Pro. Communities populated by tools/builders-scraper.cjs. Scores computed by tools/build-builder-profiles.cjs — never edit score.* fields by hand.

warranty.notes: Reduced from 10yr structural to 6yr for contracts signed Jan 1, 2026 or later. Homes under contract before Jan 1, 2026 retain 10yr coverage. Administered by 2-10 Home Buyers Warranty.

Perry uses a 2-10 structure: the 2yr "Express Limited Warranty" covers workmanship AND mechanical systems (HVAC, plumbing, electrical, countertops, flooring, paint, hardware) in one combined period. No separate 1yr workmanship tier.
Standard 1-2-10. Assigned Warranty Service Representative conducts a walk-through near the 1yr anniversary.

reviews.place_name: David Weekley Homes Dallas/Ft. Worth Division Office

warranty.notes: Standard 1-2-10 administered by 2-10 Home Buyers Warranty (third-party insured). Transferable to subsequent owners.

bbb.notes: Listed as Drees Custom Homes on BBB

warranty.notes: Standard 1-2-10. Transferable. 2yr systems period not explicitly listed in some marketing materials but is standard per Texas Property Code 430; verify with Drees warranty documentation.

builders.tier_notes: Classified as production by industry analysts due to national volume; offers more finish options than typical production builders — sometimes described as luxury production or semi-custom by consumers
builders.name: Toll Brothers

bbb.notes: National profile (HQ: Fort Washington, PA); complaints are company-wide
complaint_themes: Construction quality inconsistency for luxury price point: drywall seams, ceiling cracks, gapped flooring, improperly taped walls
Electrical/safety issues: incorrect garage wiring (fire hazard), outlets installed incorrectly, non-standard installations
Spec/square footage discrepancies: homes built to different specs than contracted; some buyers discovered wrong sq footage days before closing
Post-close warranty responsiveness: unreturned emails, missed walk-through appointments, first-year warranty items disputed

warranty.notes: Standard 1-2-10. Structural warranty excludes exterior wall cladding (brick, stucco, siding). No action required for structural unless home is unsafe.

communities.name: Toll Brothers at Creek Meadows West

bbb.notes: DFW profile (Coppell, TX); complaints are company-wide per BBB
complaint_themes: Foundation movement in some DFW communities: known subdivision-level issues in Roanoke/Briarwyck; heaving/settlement reported
Water intrusion: seeping through garage walls, windows, and flashing; roof leaks reported
Post-sale communication drop-off: sales team attentive pre-contract, warranty team described as unresponsive after closing
Warranty classification disputes: buyers report repairs reclassified as 'maintenance' to deny claims

warranty.notes: Standard 1-2-10. Cosmetic items corrected one time only at/near the 1yr anniversary date.
Standard 1-2-10 administered by 2-10 Home Buyers Warranty (third-party insured).
Structural warranty is 6 years, not the more common 10yr standard. Administered by American eWarranty. Transferable within 30 days of resale (written notice required or warranty voids).

bbb.notes: Not Rated — BBB states business is in process of responding to previously closed complaints; complaints are company-wide
complaint_themes: Structural and material defects: driveways cracking/crumbling within months, garage door misalignment, uneven floors, roof leaks
Warranty repair delays: promised appointments missed, issues unresolved 2+ years post-closing, difficulty reaching customer service
Coercive closing practices reported: buyers threatened with deposit forfeiture to sign on homes with unresolved major defects
BBB 'Not Rated' status (as of Q2 2026) due to volume of complaints under review — notable red flag vs peers

warranty.notes: Above-standard: includes additional 5yr water infiltration warranty (covers internal leaks and various water intrusion types) on top of standard 1-2-10. Warranty is transferable.
Standard 1-2-10. Year 1 described as "bumper-to-bumper." Excludes gale force winds and acts of nature from structural coverage.

bbb.notes: IMPORTANT: GFO Home LLC (Dallas) is a completely separate company from Gehan Homes/Brightland Homes. C- grade with 4 complaints in 3yr period, 1 failure to respond. NOT BBB accredited. BBB address: 2750 Burbank St, Dallas TX 75235. The former builders.json entry incorrectly linked to the Brightland/Gehan BBB page (A+ grade, 65 complaints) — that data has been removed.

warranty.notes: Structural warranty is 6 years (foundation latent defects), not the more common 10yr standard. 1yr workmanship is non-transferable; 2yr mechanical and 6yr structural transfer to new owner on resale.

bbb.notes: Not Rated on BBB — DFW entity: Chesmar Homes DFW LTD (Richardson, TX)

warranty.notes: Standard 1-2-10 administered by 2-10 Home Buyers Warranty.

trustbuilder.notes: Dimension breakdown not available for Dallas market; overall score only

bbb.notes: National profile (HQ: Atlanta, GA); complaints are company-wide
complaint_themes: Finish work quality: paint, trim, and drywall finishes consistently cited as below expectations; poor craftsmanship at closing
HVAC reliability: repeated repair calls required within first 5 years, not just routine maintenance
Moisture/water issues: shower panel installations allowing water into walls; roof shingles improperly nailed
Warranty service speed: slow response times reported across multiple markets; overall satisfaction ratings low (1.6/5 on ConsumerAffairs)

warranty.notes: Standard 1-2-10. Beazer provides 10yr structural warranty directly (not third-party administered).

bbb.notes: No BBB profile found for Coventry Homes in DFW as of Q2 2026

warranty.notes: Warranty documentation describes a 1yr coverage for materials, workmanship, AND mechanical systems combined, plus 10yr structural. Systems period appears to be 1yr (not 2yr). Verify with Coventry warranty book (DFH Form Rev. 4/6/2023) for Texas-specific terms.

bbb.notes: Listed as "Horton, D R, Custom Homes" on BBB; complaints are company-wide
complaint_themes: Construction quality reflects entry-level price point: substandard materials, improper installations, peeling concrete, cheap cabinets/fixtures reported
HVAC sizing and moisture issues in Texas heat: units run constantly but fail to control humidity, leading to condensation and mold reports
Warranty/post-close responsiveness: slow or unresponsive teams, unresolved structural defects persisting months after move-in
DHI Mortgage class action (2025): buyers alleged property taxes were systematically underestimated to make monthly payments appear lower than actual

warranty.notes: Standard 1-2-10. Warranty clock starts on closing date, not move-in date.
Standard 1-2-10. Systems coverage termed "delivery systems" (electrical, plumbing, HVAC).
Standard 1-2-10. Aims to resolve all warranty requests within 7 business days.

reviews.place_name: American Legend Homes Corporate Office - Texas

warranty.notes: Standard 1-2-10. Structural warranty administered by StrucSure Home Warranty Company (independent third-party).
Standard 1-2-10. Structural warranty administered by ProHome Warranty Management Services (independent third-party). Systems coverage termed "distribution systems."
Standard Lennar 1-2-10 limited warranty. Structural backed by Lennar internally; no third-party administrator publicly disclosed for DFW market.
Standard 1-2-10 limited warranty. Structural warranty backed in-house; no third-party administrator publicly disclosed.
LGI published warranty: 1 year on entire home and 10 year structural. No explicit 2-year mechanical systems warranty found in public documentation.
Standard 1-2-10 limited warranty. Structural warranty backed by 2-10 Home Buyers Warranty (2-10 HBW) — confirmed third-party administrator.
M/I Homes offers 1-Year Customer Care coverage and 10-Year Construction Defects structural warranty (transferable). No explicit 2-year mechanical systems tier found in DFW-specific documentation.
Standard 1-2-10 limited express warranty. In-house warranty administration.
Standard 1-2-10 warranty. 2-10 HBW structure. Warranty requests at ashtonwoods.com/warranty-ticket.

builders.name: Riverside Homebuilders
builders.bbb_search: Riverside Homebuilders Ltd Fort Worth TX

warranty.notes: Structural 10-year coverage administered by StrucSure Home Warranty, LLC (third-party). Major structural claims backed by Golden Insurance Company.
Standard 1-2-10 builder warranty. Third-party administrator not confirmed publicly.
Uses StrucSure Home Warranty (builder-backed, third-party administered). Confirmed in BBB complaint response.
Standard 1-2-10 builder-backed limited warranty. Green Brick Partners sibling Southgate confirmed uses StrucSure — Normandy likely same administrator.
Uses 2-10 Home Buyers Warranty (2-10 HBW). Confirmed on megatelhomes.com/2-10-warranty-detail.

builders.name: Trophy Signature Homes

trustbuilder.notes: Individual community reviews available on Eliant; no aggregate TrustBuilder score published as of 2026-Q2 research

complaint_themes: exterior paint and finish issues post-close

warranty.notes: Standard 1-2-10. Structural administered by 2-10 Home Buyers Warranty (third-party). Online warranty request form at trophysignaturehomes.com/warranty-request. Conducts 3-6-9-12 month check-in schedule. Notable non-warrantable: fences, cabinet damage, carpet, caulking shrinkage, subfloor squeaks, tile chips, glass/mirror damage, wood floor scratches.

builders.kristens_notes: Green Brick Partners subsidiary (NYSE: GRBK). Founded 2018 in DFW, 7th largest DFW homebuilder. Strong energy-efficiency package bundled at base price. 25 active DFW communities as of May 2026. ENERGY STAR certified. Operation Finally Home partner. Green Brick Mortgage (in-house lender) tied to rate incentives. Primary complaint: post-close warranty responsiveness.
